mapper.select:
select bd.id, bd.subsidy_person_id, bd.grant_org, bd.account_name, bd.relation_to_insured, bd.bank_account, bd.approval_status, bd.material_status, bd.payment_plan_generated, bd.submit_by, bd.submit_time, bd.create_time, coalesce(bd.id_card_no, sp.id_card_no) as id_card_no, group_concat(distinct bdi.subsidy_type order by bdi.subsidy_type separator '/') as subsidy_type, sp.name, sp.user_code from benefit_determination bd left join shebao_subsidy_person sp on bd.subsidy_person_id = sp.id left join benefit_determination_item bdi on bdi.determination_id = bd.id and bdi.del_flag = '0' where bd.del_flag = '0'
and sp.name like concat('%', #{req.name}, '%')
and coalesce(bd.id_card_no, sp.id_card_no) like concat('%', #{req.idCardNo}, '%')
and exists ( select 1 from benefit_determination_item bdi2 where bdi2.determination_id = bd.id and bdi2.del_flag = '0' and ( (#{req.subsidyType} = '1' and bdi2.subsidy_type in ('land_loss','land_loss_resident')) or (#{req.subsidyType} = '2' and bdi2.subsidy_type in ('expropriatee','expropriatee_subsidy')) or (#{req.subsidyType} = '3' and bdi2.subsidy_type in ('demolition','demolition_resident')) or (#{req.subsidyType} = '4' and bdi2.subsidy_type = 'village_official') or (#{req.subsidyType} = '5' and bdi2.subsidy_type in ('teacher','teacher_subsidy')) or (#{req.subsidyType} not in ('1','2','3','4','5') and bdi2.subsidy_type = #{req.subsidyType}) ) )
and bd.approval_status = #{req.approvalStatus}
and bd.material_status = #{req.materialStatus}
group by bd.id, bd.subsidy_person_id, bd.grant_org, bd.account_name, bd.relation_to_insured, bd.bank_account, bd.approval_status, bd.material_status, bd.payment_plan_generated, bd.submit_by, bd.submit_time, bd.create_time, coalesce(bd.id_card_no, sp.id_card_no), sp.name, sp.user_code order by bd.create_time desc, bd.id desc

select bd.id, bd.subsidy_person_id, bd.eligible_year, bd.eligible_month, bd.grant_org, bd.account_name, bd.relation_to_insured, bd.grant_remark, bd.bank_account, bd.approval_status, bd.material_status, bd.material_zip_path, bd.material_image_paths, bd.submit_by, bd.submit_time, bd.review_by, bd.review_time, bd.review_remark, coalesce(bd.id_card_no, sp.id_card_no) as id_card_no, sp.name, sp.user_code from benefit_determination bd left join shebao_subsidy_person sp on bd.subsidy_person_id = sp.id where bd.id = #{id} and bd.del_flag = '0' limit 1
